shared_properties: HUD presents HP icons on the left and the MM:SS timer on the right with no progress bar or floor counter.
Pixel-font framing and icon spacing stay clean at 1280x720 output without fractional scaling.
differences: This sheet combines full HP icon, empty HP icon, timer plate, and small separator ornaments in one UI atlas for the top HUD.

reference_images.label: Slip Down GDD mirror
reference_images.purpose: HUD layout, HP count, timer placement, and absent-progress rule grounding.

reference_images.label: Slip Down moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Low-saturation UI framing against the dungeon backdrop grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageNode slices inside a top-anchored UI tree, with health icons and timer plate drawn from one atlas-backed texture.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/survival_hud_panel.png through AssetServer and cache the atlas handle in the HUD setup resource keyed by asset_key.
runtime_notes: Atlas width is 192 px and height is 24 px.
HP icons are authored at 8x8 px and timer plate supports pixel-font overlays.
Top HUD anchors to the safe area with integer coordinates only.

context.role: Top-screen survival HUD that shows HP and elapsed time while preserving the no-progress philosophy.
context.usage: Visible during active play and hidden during title, pause, game over, and clear overlays.

deliverables.notes: Atlas containing filled and empty HP icons plus the timer plate and corner ornaments.
Slice map for HP icons, timer plate, and corner ornaments used by the HUD tree.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas size is exactly 192x24 px and contains the full HP icon, empty HP icon, and timer plate slices.
No progress bar, floor counter, or minimap ornament is present in the atlas.
HP icon silhouettes remain readable at 8x8 px and the timer plate leaves enough empty area for MM:SS text.
